subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. It would be great to continue the conversation and explore potential ways to work together.

The following meeting windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those options work for you, please let us know your preferred time within the window and we can take it from there.

As for your request for direct contact details for internal personnel, I’m not able to share internal email addresses, phone numbers, or directory information. Please refer to our public website for the appropriate public contact channels.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
